steps.title: Identify the appositive structure
steps.content: Before the blank: the start of a possessive noun phrase (“the plant's [noun]”). After the blank: an appositive phrase (“the cellular organs that generate energy from light”) followed in the text by an em-dash.

steps.title: Apply the matching em-dash rule for appositives
steps.content: Appositives set off by an em-dash require matching em-dashes on both sides. Choice D (chloroplasts—) provides the opening em-dash to pair with the one already present after the appositive. Choices A, B, and C lack the necessary matching em-dash. That matches choice D — D is correct.
